nasb.text: that their hearts may melt, and many fall at all their gates. I have given the glittering sword. Ah! It is made for striking like lightning, it is wrapped up in readiness for slaughter.

esv.text: that their hearts may melt, and many stumble. At all their gates I have given the glittering sword. Ah, it is made like lightning; it is taken up for slaughter.

cnv.text: 好使他們心慌意亂，多人跌倒，我在他們所有的城門那裡布下了殺戮的人；啊！這刀做得閃爍發光，磨得尖利，可以殺戮。

ccb.text: 使他们吓得肝胆俱裂，许多人倒在家门口。我已赐下这亮如闪电的刀，用来杀戮。
